title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services:
Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services!
